organization.name: security.eu
organization.description: Managed cybersecurity services powered by AI and expert oversight. EU-native compliance solutions.

services.name: CSR Managed Assurance
services.shortDescription: AI-powered responses to security questionnaires and vendor assessments
services.fullDescription: Expert-led, AI-powered responses to security questionnaires, contract appendices, and compliance assessments. Our service combines artificial intelligence with expert human oversight to deliver high-quality security requirement responses.

services.name: NIS2 Mandatory Training
services.shortDescription: Cybersecurity training for boards and management to meet NIS2 Article 20 requirements
services.fullDescription: Structured cybersecurity training for boards and senior management to fulfill NIS2 Article 20 requirements. Covers governance, risk management, incident response, and regulatory obligations specific to the NIS2 directive.

services.name: NIS2 Policy Compliance Check
services.shortDescription: Automated assessment of information security policies against NIS2 requirements
services.fullDescription: Automated assessment of your information security policies against NIS2 requirements. Identifies gaps, highlights non-compliance areas, and provides recommendations for achieving compliance readiness.
